name: Lorenzo Bianchi Chignoli
title: PhD Candidate in Economics
institution: Universitat Pompeu Fabra & Bank of Italy
bio: I am a PhD Candidate in Economics at Universitat Pompeu Fabra (Barcelona) and a Research Intern at the Bank of Italy. My research focuses on New Keynesian theory, macrofinance, nonclearing markets, and deep learning for macroeconomics.

contact.address: C. Ramon Trias Fargas, 25-27 | 08005 Barcelona, Spain
